ddls:
CREATE TABLE "system_call_types" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each system call type */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the system call type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the system call type */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the system call category */,
  "subcategory_id" INTEGER /* ID of the system call subcategory */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_system_call_types_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES system_call_categories ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_system_call_types_subcategory_id FOREIGN KEY ("subcategory_id") REFERENCES system_call_subcategories ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_call_categories" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each system call category */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the system call category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the system call category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_call_subcategories" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each system call subcategory */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the system call category */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the system call subcategory */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the system call subcategory */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_call_instance_types" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each system call instance type */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the system call instance type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the system call instance type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_call_instance_subtypes" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each system call instance subtype */,
  "instance_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the system call instance type */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the system call instance subtype */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the system call instance subtype */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_system_call_instance_subtypes_instance_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("instance_type_id") REFERENCES system_call_instance_types ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_call_parameters" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each system call parameter */,
  "system_call_id" INTEGER /* ID of the system call */,
  "parameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter */,
  "parameter_value" TEXT /* Value of the parameter */,
  "parameter_type" TEXT /* Data type of the parameter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_call_return_values" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each system call return value */,
  "system_call_id" INTEGER /* ID of the system call */,
  "return_value" INTEGER /* Return value of the system call */,
  "return_type" TEXT /* Data type of the return value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_call_errors" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each system call error */,
  "system_call_id" INTEGER /* ID of the system call */,
  "error_code" INTEGER /* Error code */,
  "error_message" TEXT /* Error message */,
  "error_type" TEXT /* Type of error */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_call_alerts" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each system call alert */,
  "system_call_id" INTEGER /* ID of the system call */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Alert message */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_call_notifications" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each system call notification */,
  "system_call_id" INTEGER /* ID of the system call */,
  "notification_message" TEXT /* Notification message */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_call_analytics" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each system call analytics data */,
  "system_call_id" INTEGER /* ID of the system call */,
  "analytics_data" TEXT /* Analytics data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_call_reporting" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each system call reporting data */,
  "system_call_id" INTEGER /* ID of the system call */,
  "reporting_data" TEXT /* Reporting data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)
